Virat Kohli Shatters Sachin Tendulkar’s Record as Century Scoring Spree Continues

Dec 4, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Virat Kohli continues to redefine excellence in ODI cricket

Kohli’s 102-run innings showcased his mastery and consistency, continuing his record-breaking run-scoring streak in ODIs.
